name: recolab
description: Local AI-integrated recommendation platform with Next.js, Express, PostgreSQL, Valkey, Ollama, and Qdrant.

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w @recolab/api" "npm run dev -w @recolab/web" "npm run dev -w @recolab/worker"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @recolab/shared && npm run build -w @recolab/api && npm run build -w @recolab/worker && npm run build -w @recolab/web
